query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `searchHistory` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `searchType` enum('NSN', 'PART_NUMBER') NOT NULL,
  `searchQuery` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `results` text,
  `resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_userId_createdAt` (`userId`, `createdAt`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DbFWBt8gwnQnj8.root --database BXyM8tsiBzyiLesGPs5z3o --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `searchHistory` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `searchType` enum('NSN', 'PART_NUMBER') NOT NULL,
  `searchQuery` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `results` text,
  `resultCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_userId_createdAt` (`userId`, `createdAt`)
);
